creator: bdrewery@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Sean Bruno from comment #8)
> (In reply to Bryan Drewery from comment #4)
> No, I sure didn't.
> 
> I'm running tests on head and the builds go very sideways now with that
> _MAKE_JOBS=-j1 flag.  This is something that is different in poudriere vs
> poudirere-devel right?

I am shocked!

Anyhow, it wouldn't cause what was reported in comment #5. The -j1 _MAKE_JOBS flag is not used there.
